parameters.name: x-correlation-id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for every request. 
Can be used for tracking down answers 
with technical support. 
Uses the ULID format (a time-based, sortable UUID). 
Note this will be different for every request.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
An array containing field and direction for sorting
|Field|Type|Description|
|-----|----|-----------|
|customer_id|integer|Customer ID|
|tsp_code|string|Univeral TSP Code|
|wallet_identifier|string|Wallet Identifier|
|is_preferred|integer|Preferred wallet|

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: An array containing from and to rande of displayed items

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
An object containing all filter values
|Filter|Type|Description|
|------|----|-----------|
|customer_id|integer|Customer ID|
|tsp_code|integer|Universal TSP Code|
|wallet_identifier|string|Wallet Identifier|
|is_preferred|integer|Preferred wallet|

logo.description: Path to binary image file of the logo on files store

business_id.description: Unique url slug for the corporate subsidiary

external_name_short.description: External short name of the corporate subsidiary

external_name_long.description: External long name of the corporate subsidiary

is_erp_integrated.description:
Specifies if ERP connector is available and configued for the
Corporate Group. This value determines whether async requests such
as remote customer lookup, payment registrations, and settlements
will be performed

max_amount.description:
Maximum Payment Amount accepted for a payment to any bank of this
subsidiary.

logo.description: Path to binary image file of the logo on files store

amount.description: The amount that the customer is paying without fees

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the payment was processed by the instrument

error.description: Forwarded error from the payment instrument

country.description: ISO Alpha-2 Code of the Country

logo.description: Path to binary image file of the logo on files store

name.description: Name of the Payment Method to be presented to user

name_short.description: Short name of the Payment Method to be presented in reports

stepHints.description: Service Payment Steps to present to the user/agent

returnsDigitalVoucher.description: If set to true , then the successful collection for this service will return a digital voucher code that can be queried from the system for presentation to the customer

is_active.description: Defines if the Payment Method is active

is_customer_search_enabled.description:
Defines whether customers for this particular Corporate Subsidiary
are searchable

is_supporting_customer_wallets.description:
Defines whether customers of the Corporate Subsidiary can have
their CustomerWallet.

import_schedule.description: Customer import schedule in cron format.

stepHints.description: Service Payment Steps to present to the user/agent

returnsDigitalVoucher.description: If set to true , then the successful collection for this service will return a digital voucher code that can be queried from the system for presentation to the customer

is_active.description: Defines if the service is active for the related Subsidiary

depot_manager.example: Identifier of user responsible for warehouse

wallet_identifier.description: Wallet Identifier to collect payment from

is_preferred.description: true when this account is the default one

logo_for_payment_portal.description:
Copies the path to the logo from the main entity. 
This will be used in Smartcash Portal

is_active.description: Defines if the theme is active

url.description: Points to a URL with the logo of the service

hash.description: MD5 Hash of the logo provided via URL. This field stores the hash of the logo. If the logo is updated the hash will change.

allowCustomAmountEntry.description: If set to true, then the user is required to enter a custom amount to be paid within the min/max bounds stepped by the denomination

allowPartial.description: If set to true, then less than the amount for the payment item can be paid

allowOverpay.description: If set to true, then more than the amount for the payment item can be paid

min.description: Minimum amount that needs to be paid for this service in local currency

max.description: Maximum amount that can be paid for this service in local currency

denomination.description:
Service payment denomination. The payment amount must be a multiple of the denomination value.
Example:

|Denomination|Amount|Valid|
|-----|-----|-------|
|1|100|true|
|5|100|true|
|200|100|false|
|50|60|false|

regex.description: Regex for front end field validation

mandatory.description: Defines if the field is required

regex.description: Regex for front end field validation

mandatory.description: Defines if the field is required

lang.description: Language of value text in iso notation (en | fr)
Language of value text in iso notation (en | fr)

value.description: Label translation for UI presentation on device

language.description: Target language to retrieve the translations for (e.g. 'en', 'fr', etc.)

raw.description: Original error response as is received from service provider, including header/body where applicable

providerErrorCode.description: Original error code sent by the service provider that is extracted (if available)

devMsg.description: Custom notes/log/message from developer for easier error resolution by OPS team"

severity.description: Severity Level (NO|LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH) - will trigger notification actions in Smobilpay (e.g. alert ops on LOW and MEDIUM - alert management on HIGH)

enumThemeUrlType.description:
Defines the type of the partner

|Status|Description|
|-----|-----|
|GROUP|GROUP|
|SUBSIDIARY|SUBSIDIARY|
|RESELLER|RESELLER|

enumChannel.description:
SPA (Smartcash Portal = DigiPay), S3P, App, etc.

|Status|Description|
|-----|-----|
|SPA|SPA|
|S3P|S3P|
|App|App|
|WebPay|WebPay|

InputEnum.description:
Type of accepted input (e.g. for keypad support)
- "NUMERICAL": input will only be numerical
- "ALPHA_CS": input will contain letters and numbers and is case sensitive
- "ALPHA_CI": input will contain letters and numbers and is case insensitive
- "QRCODE": scan qr code

QueryFieldId.description:
Type of field
- "SVCNMB": Service Number
- "CUSNMB": Customer Number
- "BILLNMB": Bill Number
- "QRCODE": QR Code

SubmitFieldTypeEnum.description:
Type of data field to capture from user during payment submission
- "SVCNMB": Service Number
- "CUSNMB": Customer Number
- "PAYREF": Custom Reference
- "CUSEMAIL": Customer Email
- "CUSPHONE": Customer Phone
- "CUSADDR": Customer Address
- "CUSNAME": Customer Name
- "OTP": OTP

enumCorporateSubsidiaryServiceType.description:
Defines service types that can be supported by Corporate Subsidiaries

|Status|Description|
|-----|-----|
|DEPOSITFUNDS|DEPOSITFUNDS|
|BILLPAY|BILLPAY|
|PRODUCT|PRODUCT|
